title: Accommodating Archery
description: This resource pack adds distinction in loaded crossbows, allowing you to see whats loaded at a glance.
body:
This resource pack adds distinction in loaded crossbows, allowing you to see whats loaded at a glance. It adds support for all Tipped Arrows, Firework Rockets, and Spectral Arrows. It keeps the vanilla style without straying from it too much, hopefully you enjoy!


**TERMS OF USE**
```
You cannot use any of my original assets or resources for commercial use

You can redistribute my assets in your own resource pack as long I receive credit for it in a credits.txt file within the resource pack and on the page it is being hosted

You can use this resource pack within videos or live streams, however a link to my profile would be appreciated
```
Basically, follow the [CC-BY-NC-SA License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/).


**This resource pack only works in Java snapshot version 25w04a and onward! Do not use in 1.21.4 and below!**
